compositionNotes: Exterior volcanic ridge, not a forge interior — obsidian outcrops frame a lava-river mid-background.
Smoke + cinder sparks drift; faint stained-glass Embertide-of-Power panes embedded in the basalt edges.
Lower-center obsidian flagstone ridge is the battlefield stage.
notes: Wild-boss variant sibling to cathedral_combat_bg_emberpeak_001 (region arena).
